voice_observations.caption_text:
A premium in-club recovery & wellness experience has landed at Fitness First Media City. 🚀✨

@longevityroomdubai has started their roadshow, travelling across Fitness First clubs so more members across the city can experience it. 👀🔥

Here’s the upcoming schedule: 📍✨
Media City | 28–30 April 
Mudon Ranches | 5–7 May 
Mirdif City Centre |12–14 May 
The Palm | 19–21 May 
Bay Gate | 9–11 June 

Pre-book your spot via the link in bio! 🚨

#𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘𝐀𝐓𝐅𝐈𝐓𝐍𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐅𝐈𝐑𝐒𝐓 ❤️
#FitnessFirstME #AboveandBeyond #GoFurtherWithFitnessFirst #Longevity Wellness
voice_observations.voiceover_text: Hello guys, Uriam here, founder of Longevity Rogue, health and wellness center that brings together game-changing solution to both mind and body. We're here at Fitness First Media City and proud to announce a roadshow partnership where we will be delivering recovery therapies and performance testing across Fitness First clubs to help you train smart and recover fast. Some of our products and services include altitude training, co2 max training, IVs and peptides, doctor consultations, brain gym and much more. What makes this truly special is the expertise behind it. We've partnered with leading specialists here in the UAE to ensure every member gets access to world-class guidance and care. Fitness First Media City is just the beginning of the roadshow. From next week we'll be visiting other Fitness First clubs so all of you can experience our health and wellness benefits.
